chunks.en: Today I want to talk about a bug I found at work.
chunks.ja: 今日は、仕事で見つけた不具合についてお話ししたいと思います。

chunks.en: The last bug I noticed was a login button that didn't work.
chunks.ja: この前気づいた不具合は、動かないログインボタンでした。

chunks.en: First, I write down the steps and take a few screenshots.
chunks.ja: まず、手順を書き留めて、スクリーンショットを何枚か撮ります。

chunks.en: Then I tell my team on Slack with a short and clear message.
chunks.ja: それから、短くて分かりやすいメッセージでチームにSlackでSlackで伝えます。

chunks.en: To show the problem, I explain each step so others can see it too.
chunks.ja: 問題を見せるために、他の人も分かるように各手順を説明します。

chunks.en: When it got fixed, I felt really happy and relieved about it.
chunks.ja: それが直ったとき、私は本当に嬉しくて、ほっとしました。

outline: Opening: a bug I found at work
How I write it down and tell my team
Steps I take to show the problem
Wrap-up: how I felt when it was fixed

modelTalk.text: Last week I found a bug at work. The app crashed when I clicked "save." It happened every time, so I knew it wasn't just me. First, I wrote it down in my notes. I like to keep things simple and clear. Then I told my team on our chat. I said what I did and what went wrong. I also wrote the steps, one by one. So they could see the same problem too. I took a short video of my screen as well. Pictures help more than long words, I think. My teammate read it and started to fix it fast. When it got fixed, I felt really happy and calm. It's a good feeling when you help make things better. Small bugs matter, and I'm glad I spoke up.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about a bug I found last week at work.
chunks.ja: 今日は、先週仕事で見つけた不具合についてお話ししたいです。

chunks.en: The last bug I noticed was a login page that froze on mobile phones.
chunks.ja: この前気づいた不具合は、スマホでログインページが固まるというものでした。

chunks.en: How I tell my team is I write a short note with clear steps in our chat.
chunks.ja: チームへの伝え方としては、はっきりした手順を書いた短いメモをチャットに投稿します。

chunks.en: The steps I take to show the problem are recording my screen and adding the error log.
chunks.ja: 問題を見せるための手順は、画面を録画してエラーログを添えることです。

chunks.en: When it got fixed, I felt really relieved because our users could log in again.
chunks.ja: 直ったとき、ユーザーがまたログインできるようになって、本当にほっとしました。

outline: Opening: introduce a recent bug at work
Point 1: how I record and report it to the team
Point 2: the steps I use to reproduce and show it
Wrap-up: how relieved I felt when it was fixed

modelTalk.text: So, the last bug I found at work was pretty annoying. When I clicked "save," the page just froze. My data didn't get stored at all. First, I wrote it down in my notebook. I like to keep short, clear notes. Then I told my team on our chat app. I tried to explain it in simple words. To show the problem, I took some screenshots. I also wrote the exact steps I took. Click here, type this, then it breaks. I even made a short screen recording. That way, my teammates could see it fast. A few days later, someone fixed it. Honestly, I felt really happy and relieved. It's nice when people listen to you. It's a small thing, but it helped everyone. Now the app works well, and I feel proud. Reporting bugs isn't scary anymore for me.
